speaker_notes: - Keep this grounded in one concrete example rather than too many possibilities.

kicker.value: Agents can help us navigate physical environments and locations

right_label.value: Why stop at websites and applications?

point_1.value: Your assistant knows your goals and has access to your information.

point_2.value: When you enter a location, your assistant gains tools and instructions for that environment.

point_3.value: Grocery stores: reads your shopping list, helps you navigate inventory and aisles.

point_4.value: Home environment: sets your thermostat, interacts with IoT devices
